title: Handbook co-authorship: $2,000 (or 50% royalty)
content:
Handbook co-authorship: $2,000 (or 50% royalty)  
Retroactive adjustment if we land $50K+ grants

Total: $16,000–$20,000

AI: Timeline structure:
Months 1–4: Exploratory collaboration (unpaid; foundational investment)  
Month 4–5: Grant application submissions  
Months 5–8: Prototype completion during funding review  
October 2025+: Compensation distribution as grants award

ANTHONY: You're not gambling on my follow-through. These grants are documented, real, with transparent eligibility criteria. I'm showing you the roadmap before asking you to walk it.

---

WHY THIS MATTERS BEYOND MONEY

ANTHONY: I generate constantly but release nothing. You publish selectively but decisively.

Together: a methodology for participatory narrative that preserves artistic coherence while enabling genuine collective agency.

AI: Intellectual contribution that gets referenced in future scholarship. Shapes how other artists think about audience, performance, shared creation.
